name: Coatings - Get Past Customers in Charlotte

content.query:
SELECT [CustomerID]
,[FirstName]
,[LastName]
,[Address1]
,[Address2]
,[City]
,[State]
,cst.[Zip]
,[Phone]
,cleansedEmails.[Email]
 FROM 
 [EDW].[DIM_CUSTOMER] cst
 ,(
    SELECT distinct [ZipCode], BranchID
    FROM [EDW].[DIM_BRANCH_ZIP]
    where BranchID = 'MAC-GSCLT'
) zipList
,(
SELECT
prospect_id
,lower(
    case 
    when CHARINDEX(',',cleansedEmail) = 0 then cleansedEmail
    else LEFT(cleansedEmail,CHARINDEX(',',cleansedEmail)-1)
    end
) as Email
FROM 
(
select
[CustomerID] as prospect_id
,replace(
replace(
replace(
    [Email],
    '@,','@'),
    ',com','.com'),
    '.prod','')
cleansedEmail
from
[EDW].[DIM_CUSTOMER]
where
Email is not null
and len([Email]) > 4
and Email like '%@%'
--and DATEDIFF(HOUR,LP_LastChanged,GETDATE()) <= (24*1)
) xyz
)cleansedEmails
WHERE
cst.Zip = zipList.ZipCode
and cst.CustomerID = cleansedEmails.prospect_id
and cst.Email is not null
